exhibits.name: List of State Franchise Administrators
exhibits.notes: Standard list of state administrators for CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, OR, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI.

exhibits.name: List of Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Agents by state. California agent: Sally Baldridge at HQ address.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: RSM US LLP audited financial statements for years ended Dec 31, 2024, 2023, 2022. Clean opinion. Balance sheet, income statement, retained earnings, cash flows, 13 notes.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement – Class Owner and State-Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: Class Owner Franchise Agreement plus state-specific addenda to the agreement (distinct from Exhibit K which contains FDD addenda).

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement – Associate and State-Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: Associate Franchise Agreement plus state-specific addenda.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement – Business Owner and State-Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: Business Owner Franchise Agreement plus state-specific addenda.

exhibits.name: The Studio Navigation
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for The Studio (proprietary franchise portal). 662 total pages/videos.

exhibits.name: Information on Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Current franchisee list for Wisconsin (or closest 100 if fewer than 100 in state). Also includes former franchisees who ceased within 12 months ended Dec 31, 2024.

exhibits.name: Addendum to Franchise Agreement (Junior Jazzercise / LO Jazzercise)
exhibits.notes: Two addenda: Junior Jazzercise (children's programs) and LO Jazzercise (low impact formats).

exhibits.name: General Release
exhibits.notes: General release form required for renewal and transfer.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: FDD addenda for: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin.

exhibits.name: Jazzercise New Franchisee Training Participation Agreement
